titleStmt.title: SII 16.228: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 228. (A.R. No. 411 of 1911.) VOṆṬIMIṬṬA, SIDHAVATAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the eastern gōpura of the Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Āshāḍha śu. 12, Monday, corresponding to 1558 A.D., June 27.

The inscription records a gift of the village Voṇṭimeṭṭa with its hamlets in Sidhavaṭam-sīma of Udayagiri-rājya to god Raghunāyaka of the same village said to have been consecrated by Jāṁbavanta, by Nāgarājayyadēva-mahārāju of Kāśyapagōtra, and Sūrya-vaṁs11a and the son-in-law of Rāmarājayya and Gutti Yaṟa-Tirumala rājayyadēva-mahārāju, sons of śrīraṅgarāju and the grandsons of Āravīṭi Rāmarāju of Ātrēya-gōtra and Sōma-vaṁs11a. The gift village was situted in Siddhavaṭam-sīma which the donor appears to have held as his nāyaṅkara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīrāmacaṁdrāya namaḥ .
svastiśrī jayādbudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayuktisaṁvatsara Āṣāḍa śu 12 sō śrīma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēvama
hārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhvi(vi)sāṁ
mrājyamu cēyucuṁḍḍagānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara pāṁḍḍa
vakuladhurya kalyāṇarājyasthāpanācārya hosabirudaragaṁḍḍa gaṁḍḍa
ragūḷibiruda manyavibhāḷādimahābirudāṁkka Abhinavasāhasāṁ
ka satyabhāṣāvrataparāyaṇa cāḷukyanārāyaṇulaIna Ātrēya
gōtrapavitṛlaina sōmavaṁśādhīśvarulaIna Āraviṭirāmarāju
pautrulaIna śrīraṁggarājuputrulaIna rāmarājayya guttiya
ra tirumalrājayyadēvamahārājulu sadāsivadēvamahā
rāyalaku dakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍulaI tama Alluṁḍu kāśyapa
gōtra sūryavaṁśādhīśvaruṁḍaina māḍrāju pautruṁḍaina Auba
ḷrājuputṛṁḍaIna nāgarājayyadēvamahārājulayya
vāru vudayagirirājyānaku lōnaina nāyaṁkkarā
naku cellē sidhavaṭaṁsīmalōni śrīmaddēvadēvōttama dēvatā sā
¨rvabhauma sakaḷalōkaśaraṁṇya śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaruṁḍaiyina daI
va veśyābhujaṁguṁḍaIna jāṁbavaṁttapratiṣṭhitulaIna śrī voṁṭi
meṭṭa raghunāyakulaku nityakaṭṭaḍa Amṛtapaḷlaku Aṁga
raṁggavaIbhavālaku gōpuraprākārālaku tēru tiru
ṇāḷla mahōtsavālakunu sadāsivadēvamahārāyala
Ānatini voṁṭimeṭṭa grāmamunnū yī grāmāna
ku celle pallelunu catussīmaku lōnaina polamunnu
prathamadhvādaśīpuṇyakālamaṁddu sahiraṇyōdaka
dānadhārāpūrvakaṁgānu Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmya
sahitamugānu Ā caṁdrā¨rkka sthāI Avunaṭṭu
gānu dhāravōśisamma¨rppiṁcciIccina śilādha¨rma
śāsanamu . yī dha¨rmānaku yavvaru tappina tappi
ṁccina gaṁggalōnu gōbrāṁhmalānu tamatallidaṁ
ḍrādulānu vadhiṁccina pāpānaṁ bōvuvoru .
dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupā
lanaṁ . dānāt sva¨rggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
(ṁ)padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō hareti vasu
ṁddarā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ . svadattāt dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
dattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svada
ttaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . śrīśrīśrī
sāmāṁnyōyaṁ dharmasētu¨rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvānēvaṁ bhāvinaḥ
ppā¨rthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yāca
te rāmacaṁdraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 16.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
